overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player traverses an elevated walkway beneath towering skyscrapers, descends stairs, and walks along a street with pedestrians and vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway observing neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated MASALL signage
green neon sign for Orbital Air corporation
concrete pedestrian bridge with metal railings
large animated advertisement showing a woman in green

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on an elevated concrete walkway at night, surrounded by towering cyberpunk skyscrapers covered in neon signage. The MASALL building dominates the center view while holographic advertisements glow on the left. The walkway is empty of pedestrians, with the camera moving steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under transit bridge with vending machines

events.description: passing under overhead transit bridge structure, lighting becomes darker

agents.ego_description: continuing along walkway passing vending machines and approaching stairway

entered.detail: elevated train or vehicle bridge passing overhead
illuminated vending machine with BTC branding
stairway leading up to street level with yellow railings

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues under an overhead transit bridge, creating a more enclosed and darker environment. A vending machine appears on the right while stairs leading upward become visible ahead. The holographic billboard from the previous segment is now visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell transition between walkway and street

events.description: reaching top of stairs and transitioning to street level view

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs from elevated walkway to street level

entered.detail: yellow painted metal railings along the stairway
urban street intersection visible at top of stairs with wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a concrete stairway with yellow railings, transitioning from the covered walkway to street level. At the top, the view opens to a wet urban street intersection surrounded by neon-lit buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street sidewalk with transit and commercial buildings

events.description: exiting stairwell onto open street with pedestrian traffic
vehicle passes by on the wet street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing street activity

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking toward camera on sidewalk
car driving down wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: black metal construction fence lining the sidewalk
tropical palm trees planted along the sidewalk edge
concrete and metal barriers separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a bustling urban street at night, with wet pavement reflecting neon lights. The camera walks along a sidewalk bordered by a metal fence and palm trees on the right, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. Vehicles drive along the street to the left, and the dense cyberpunk cityscape rises in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded elevated walkway into the heart of a bustling, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins by moving steadily forward along a concrete path dominated by the MASALL building and glowing holographic advertisements. As the camera passes beneath an overhead transit bridge, the environment becomes more enclosed and dark, passing a vending machine before approaching a set of stairs. The scene then transitions upward along concrete steps with yellow railings, shifting from the covered walkway to the open air of the street level. Finally, the view expands onto a wet city sidewalk bordered by palm trees and metal fences, where the camera moves past pedestrians and flowing traffic amidst a dense backdrop of towering cyberpunk skyscrapers.
